question: [File: 'File Name: importer/src/main/java/org/hiero/mirror/importer/downloader/DownloaderProperties.java -> Scope: Critical: Any impact caused by Tampering/Manipulating Hashgraph history'] [Function: setWriteFiles(boolean)] Can an unprivileged external user exploit setWriteFiles() to enable file writing and then trigger path traversal through maliciously named stream files, causing the archiveFile() call in Downloader.verifySignatures() to overwrite critical system files with tampered Hashgraph history data?

[File: 'File Name: importer/src/main/java/org/hiero/mirror/importer/downloader/DownloaderProperties.java -> Scope: Critical: Any impact caused by Tampering/Manipulating Hashgraph history'] [Function: setWriteSignatures(boolean)] Can an unprivileged external user exploit setWriteSignatures() to enable signature writing and then trigger path traversal through maliciously named signature files, causing the archiveFile() call in Downloader.verifySignatures() to overwrite legitimate signature archives with forged ones, corrupting the Hashgraph history audit trail?

[File: 'File Name: importer/src/main/java/org/hiero/mirror/importer/downloader/DownloaderProperties.java -> Scope: Critical: Any impact caused by Tampering/Manipulating Hashgraph history'] [Function: getCommon()] Can an unprivileged external user exploit the maxConcurrency field in StreamSourceProperties (accessible via getCommon().getSources()) being set to an extremely high value to overwhelm the cloud storage provider with concurrent requests, causing legitimate signature downloads to fail and reducing effective node count below consensusRatio, allowing tampered Hashgraph history to pass verification?

[File: 'File Name: importer/src/main/java/org/hiero/mirror/importer/downloader/DownloaderProperties.java -> Scope: Critical: Any impact caused by Tampering/Manipulating Hashgraph history'] [Function: getCommon()] Can an unprivileged external user exploit the downloadRatio being set to 0 (minimum allowed by @Min(0)) to cause partialCollection() in Downloader to return zero nodes, resulting in no signatures being downloaded and the downloader silently skipping Hashgraph history verification entirely?
